message:
✨ Add stream picker, IMDB ID from TMDB, fix seasons (#24)

- Fetch IMDB ID via TMDB external_ids for playback in TMDB-only mode
- Add imdbId to TmdbShowDetail, copyWith on Show model
- Replace auto-play with stream selection bottom sheet (quality badges)
- Add logging for season fetch debugging
- Remove numberOfSeasons null guard (use 0 default instead)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
